Component: Create HA cluster from valid Neo4jCluster manifest

Expected Result: StatefulSets, services, certificate, and secrets exist; status Ready=True within 2 minutes

Component: Validate required Neo4jCluster fields and default edition

Expected Result: Edition is defaulted; required fields enforced; object accepted only when schema-valid
Comments: Existing covers CRD installation, but not required-field validation and edition defaulting.

Test Scenario: Add missing PRD test: Reject malformed cluster topology

Expected Result: Admission rejects request with clear validation message

Component: Patch upgrade rolls in safe order
Test Scenario: Extend existing broad test: Patch upgrade rolls in safe order
Preconditions: Healthy clustered deployment; synthetic Bolt/HTTP probes running
Test Steps: Change image tag to patch version; observe rollout order and RAFT role checks
Expected Result: Secondaries roll first, then non-leader primaries, leader last; no 5xx; UpgradeInProgress=False
Comments: Existing covers generic upgrade, not ordered secondaries/non-leader/leader rollout with RAFT checks and no 5xx probes.
Existing Match: Upgrade operator version; Image version upgrade; Rolling restart

Component: Block upgrade requiring major store migration
